commentaries.author: Cyprian of Carthage
commentaries.content: So it is written, "Whosoever shall deny me before men, him will I also deny before my Father and before His angels."

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: These therefore will be they whom He forewarns above not to be afraid of being only killed; and this forewarning He offers, in order that He might subjoin a clause on the necessity of confessing Him: "Every one that denieth me before men shall be denied before God"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
